title: What is the point of video annotations when I can't resolve them?

posts.author: Magasul (Olivér Varga)
posts.cookedHtml:
I create videos. Then upload it and invite the client as a guest to comment on the video and ask for any modifications.
But - and get this - I can’t actually mark the requests as done… only the client…
Now I can’t filter out and clear any comments that are done on my end because the client won’t bother marking them as resolved and it is a super unreasonable ask.
So why can’t I mark guest comments as resolved AS AN ADMIN?
… I’m super annoyed and dumbstruck… this makes this feature totally unusuable…
Am I missing something?
